Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I came down to get a drink and got caught by Mitsuru... As you can see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4075 0 0}I'm not worried about Akihiko's grades. I'm more worried he'll run off and do some reckless training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}And studying has the added benefit of preventing that possibility.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3121 0 0}So here we are. Even though I'm mostly done studying for the exams...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4062 0 0}Then, why don't you overlook {f 4 1}'s studies? That is, if he is able to join us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}All right... Sit down. I'll be your study coach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}If you're doing fine on your own, great. Just let me know if you want some help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}What's wrong? Did you decide you want Akihiko's help after all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you decide you want Akihiko's help after all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}All right... Sit down. I'll be your study coach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Well, we'll be here for a while if you change your mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}
